vendor_context: Priority Bicycles competitor (eBike / value commuter segment)
status: ACTIVE — High-growth DTC eBike brand; US market dominant; Canada live (3 models); XP4 flagship launched

networks.name: Impact
networks.notes: Primary US network. Commission rate upgraded from 3% flat to 4–6% range (~April 8–10, 2026). Affiliate page at lectricebikes.com still 404 — program application via Impact directly. Content publishers, cycling sites, review channels eligible.

networks.name: Refersion
networks.status: ACTIVE — second network (influencer/creator tier or CA delivery)
networks.notes: Active alongside Impact per magentheme.com (updated ~April 8–10, 2026; confirmed still listed as of April 30, 2026). Likely serves influencer/creator tier or Canadian market affiliate delivery — aligns with April 2 Canada launch.

networks.name: AvantLink
networks.notes: AvantLink program launched ~4 years ago (per affi.io data, 2026-04-30 fetch). This is the ORIGINAL legacy program before Lectric migrated to Impact. The 3% rate matches pre-upgrade commission. Not the active program — affiliates should use Impact or Refersion. AvantLink listing is stale aggregator data, not a new network addition.

affiliate_program.commission_summary: 4–6% on qualifying sales via Impact + Refersion (upgraded April 2026). AvantLink listing is legacy/stale at 3%.
affiliate_program.affiliate_page_status: 404 — lectricebikes.com/pages/affiliate returns 404; consistent across 2026-04-22 and 2026-04-30 audits. Program restructuring in progress. Join via Impact or Refersion directly.

april_showers_sale.notes: April Showers Sale ran early April 2026. Ended mid-April. Followed by Earth Day sale.

earth_day_sale.notes: Earth Day sale ran through late April 2026. Now ended as of April 30. XP4 750 Folding Utility bundle at $1,299 with FREE $439 gear bundle was hero offer. Heavily promoted via 9to5Toys, Electrek.

company_status.financial: STABLE — Private, Arizona-based; no distress signals. Consistent promotional cadence signals healthy inventory/margin.
company_status.positioning: Value-leader in US eBike market; high-volume, affordable folding and commuter eBikes. XP4 now flagship.

new_product.name: Lectric XP4
new_product.notes: XP4 launched as new US best-selling candidate per lectricebikes.com product page. Featured in April Showers + Earth Day promotions. XP4 750 Folding Utility bundle at $1,299 was hero SKU for affiliates during Earth Day sale.

expansion.canada_storefront: LIVE — 3 models available on Canadian storefront as of April 2026 (per ebikebc.com buyer's guide, published April 22, 2026)
expansion.canada_models: 3 models confirmed on CA storefront; expanding
expansion.canada_affiliate_status: UNCONFIRMED on Impact — Refersion likely serves as CA affiliate delivery mechanism. No CA-specific Impact program launch detected.
expansion.notes: Canada storefront fully live with 3 models. US/CA affiliate program structure still unconfirmed — Refersion likely covers CA publishers. Monitor for formal CA affiliate announcement.

competitive_intel.commission_vs_category: Lectric 4–6% (upgraded) — competitive with Aventon (4% AvantLink), below Himiway (6–10%) and Ride1Up (5–8%), above Rad (dark/rebuilding). Solid mid-range affiliate rate for high-volume brand.
competitive_intel.commission_trajectory: STABLE at 4–6% — upgraded from 3% in April 2026, no further changes detected in 2 audit cycles.
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — Program active but affiliate page 404'd (restructuring). Impact + Refersion confirmed via third-party aggregators. AvantLink legacy listing is a noise signal, not a real change.
competitive_intel.canada_affiliate_opportunity: DEVELOPING — 3 models on CA storefront; Refersion likely serving CA publishers. Watch for formal CA program launch.
competitive_intel.xp4_launch_opportunity: HIGH — New XP4 flagship with $1,299 bundle AOV = meaningfully higher affiliate payouts at 4–6% ($52–$78/sale) vs prior $928 AOV ($37–$56/sale). New product launch = affiliate content refresh opportunity.
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_priority: Priority Bicycles competes for same cycling content affiliates. Lectric's promotional machine (XP4 launch, recurring sales, Canada expansion) is running at full speed. Priority must differentiate on zero-maintenance story and premium build to win cycling YouTubers before Lectric's post-restructure affiliate program locks in top publishers.

changes: NO MATERIAL AFFILIATE PROGRAM CHANGES since 2026-04-22 audit.
Affiliate page still 404 — consistent (2nd consecutive audit).
AvantLink listing surfaced on affi.io — assessed as LEGACY/STALE (launched 4 years ago, 3% = pre-upgrade rate). Not a new network addition.
Earth Day sale ended (~April 28–30). April Showers sale also ended.
XP4 confirmed as new flagship — product page live, bundles actively promoted.
Canada storefront confirmed with 3 models (per ebikebc.com April 22 buyer's guide).
Commission rate upgraded: 3% flat → 4–6% range (per third-party aggregator data ~April 8–10, 2026). MATERIAL CHANGE.
New network detected: Refersion added alongside Impact. Previously Impact-only. MATERIAL CHANGE.
Canada storefront confirmed live: lectricebikes.com now shows CA (English) + CA (Français). Previously 'announced but unknown status'.
Earth Day sale running: up to $694 savings on select models from $799.

history.event: First audit. Confirmed Impact as primary network, 3% commission, 30-day cookie, ~$928 AOV, ~$0.97 EPC. Notable: Canada expansion announced April 2, 2026 via Vélo Canada Bikes partnership. 650k+ units sold in 6 years. Canadian affiliate program not yet confirmed.

CHANGES DETECTED. Commission rate upgraded from 3% to 4–6% range. Refersion added as second network alongside Impact. Canada storefront now live (CA English + French). Affiliate page 404'd (likely restructured). Earth Day sale active (up to $694 savings). Discord alert sent.

Routine audit. No material affiliate program changes. Core terms confirmed stable: 4–6% Impact + Refersion, 30-day cookie. Affiliate page still 404 (2nd consecutive). AvantLink affi.io listing assessed as stale legacy entry (4 years old, 3% = pre-upgrade rate) — not a new network. Earth Day + April Showers sales ended. XP4 confirmed as new flagship (bundles to $1,299 AOV). Canada storefront live with 3 models per ebikebc.com. No Discord alert fired.
